creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jacula      2010-06-25 16:46:20 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-im               Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-im/komclean      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
   KOMclean as a LysKOM client gives you a tray icon which can be used
   to open your browser to view the UI. The UI is HTML based.
  
   WWW: http://sharesource.org/project/komclean/
  
  PR:             ports/144979
  Submitted by:   Piotr Smyrak <smyru@heron.pl>
  Approved by:    tabthorpe (mentor)
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.133     +1 -0      ports/net-im/Makefile
  1.1       +59 -0     ports/net-im/komclean/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-im/komclean/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/net-im/komclean/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/net-im/komclean/pkg-plist (new)
